overall.description: A third-person perspective scene from a video game set in a grand gothic hall resembling a magic school atrium. The camera observes from a balcony overlooking a central fountain with a large statue, while students in dark robes walk through the hall below. The atmosphere is atmospheric and dimly lit with stone architecture and ornate tapestries.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic hall with central fountain and dual staircases

agents.ego_description: standing on an upper balcony near a heavy curtain, overlooking the grand hall and observing students passing below

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the camera from right to left, carrying a bag
group of students ascending the grand staircase on the right side of the hall

entered.detail: dark heavy drapery framing the balcony entrance where the ego stands
ornate stone balustrade along the edge of the upper balcony
large multi-tiered fountain with a prominent white statue of a winged horse and rider
massive decorative wall hanging covering the entire back wall of the hall
sweeping stone staircase ascending to the left side of the hall
sweeping stone staircase ascending to the right side of the hall
gothic stone archway at the base of the left staircase
gothic stone archway at the base of the right staircase
tall fluted stone pillar supporting the upper balcony structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a grand gothic hall viewed from an upper balcony. The ego stands near heavy curtains overlooking the space, where a magnificent central fountain with a winged horse statue dominates the marble floor below. Students in dark robes walk scattered paths through the hall, some ascending the grand staircases on either side, while the camera remains stationary observing the atmospheric interior with its ornate tapestries and stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, atmospheric observation of a grand gothic hall from an elevated vantage point. It begins from an upper balcony beside heavy curtains, looking down upon a vast marble floor dominated by a magnificent central fountain and a winged horse statue. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts to the movement below, where students in dark robes traverse scattered paths across the hall. The scene then expands to encompass the surrounding stone architecture, observing the students as they ascend the grand staircases on either side. Finally, the view settles on the ornate tapestries and dimly lit interior, capturing the stillness of the gothic atrium.
